mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (category_id, name, description, detail, cover, price, market_price, cost_price, stock, commission_amount, commission_type, status, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{detail}, #{cover}, #{price}, #{marketPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{stock}, #{commissionAmount}, #{commissionType}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
